entry.title: Repeated Git Credential Prompts in Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I recently synced my CAP application with GIT (Azure DevOps). During the initial push, everything worked smoothly. However, I've noticed that with each subsequent Git operation (Pull, Push, Fetch, Commit, etc.), Business Application Studio continuously prompts me to enter my credentials.

Has anyone else encountered this issue? If you've found a solution, I'd greatly appreciate your help.

Best regards,
Rahul Jain

entry.title: Re: Service Confirmation - Using Defined Logistics Scenario for Material Withdrawal
entry.content: Nice article!

entry.title: Deploying a fiori application from BAS for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public system, fails
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are working on an implementation of a brand new S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition for our customer and we are facing some issues when deploying a Fiori application from Business Application Studio (accessible from BTP)

First we created a simple custom table in ADT:

Then we use the "generate ABAP repository objects" to generate fiori screen for our custom table:

All of this is fine and we get this nice looking screen: 

Then we wanted to make sure that this new fiori application has its own fiori tile and that by typing its name or some key words in the "search bar" we would be able to achieve that, something like this: 

Tried to check some tutorials and it looks like this one is the good one to follow.

Thus, we connected to Business Application Studio in BTP and starter by creating a new project from Template, then we have chosen "SAP Fiori Generator"

then we have chosen "List Report Page"

Then we filled in the Data Source, and the service generated in ADT was found with no issues.

Then we applied these configurations: 

But then when trying to deploy the application, it fails!

The full error message is the following one: 

info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Creating archive with UI5 build result.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Archive created.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Starting to deploy.
info abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET YY1_APPRVDET found on target system: false
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET Request failed with status code 400
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET SAPUI5 application YY1_APPRVDET was not uploaded or registered successfully
error abap-deploy-task YY1_APPRVDET SAPUI5 application YY1_APPRVDET was not uploaded or registered successfully

(the list of errors is shared in 2 captures attached to this ticket)

On the other hand when trying to preview the application from BAS, it works perfectly: 

 

Does anyone knows how to fix this please?

I have read on internet that this might need to activate "/sap/opu/odata/UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV" but in cloud public, we have no possibility to do so.

Thank you everyone

entry.title: Re: Repeated Git Credential Prompts in Business Applicati...
entry.content: Can you try if following https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/change-git-credential-storage-setting-in-business-application-studio/ba-p/13579161 helps?

entry.title: Re: Hi I need sample fs document for sap mm buniness scne...
entry.content:
Hi Hema,

Could you please elaborate a little on this, so that we can provide more insights on this.

Best Regards

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello,

I am a university student with a strong passion for learning and improving my digital skills, particularly through SAP self-study courses. Receiving a voucher for the SAP certification exam would be an incredible opportunity for me, as it would enable me to continue my journey towards mastering these essential skills. This would not only benefit my personal growth but also help me prepare for my future career. I sincerely hope to be considered for this chance and am deeply grateful for this initiative.

Thank you so much for your consideration!

Best regards,

Tuong Vy

entry.title: Re: Network Request Error: for Post Call from Build apps to Document information extraction service
entry.content:
It would help to see the errors you get, in console, response from API.

When I send to DMS, which I am assuming is similar, I do it slightly differently, and don;t do all the blob stuff.

const {url, fileObj, token} = inputs

try {
  const formData = new FormData()

  const fileData = {
    uri: fileObj.path,
    size: fileObj.size,
    type: fileObj.mimeType,
    name: fileObj.name
  }
  formData.append('media', fileData)
  formData.append('cmisaction', 'createDocument')
  formData.append('propertyId[0]', 'cmis:objectTypeId')
  formData.append('propertyValue[0]', 'cmis:document')
  formData.append('propertyId[1]', 'cmis:name')
  formData.append('propertyValue[1]', fileObj.name)
  formData.append('succinct', true)
  formData.append('filename', fileObj.name)
  formData.append('includeAllowableActions', true)

  //------

  const response2 = await fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",

    headers: {
      "Authorization": "Bearer " + token,
      "Accept": "application/json",
      "DataServiceVersion": "2.0",
      "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data"
    },
    body: formData
  })
  return {id: response2}
  
} catch (error) {
  console.log(JSON.stringify(error))
  const errorObj = {
    code: "9",
    message: "something went wrong",
    rawError: error
  }
  return [1, errorObj]
}

The fileObj is just the output of the pick files flow function: 

outputs["Pick files"].files[0]

Don't know if this would work for you.

entry.title: Re: Lift and Shift Migrations exceed their definition
entry.content:
Hi Rafael, Apologies for late reply. Just same this. Its a good idea to plan a sandbox migration first which is a copy of production. There can be multiple advantages like:

1. Migration method and tools can be considered based on actual ultimate database size;

2. Application testing would definitely have to be more comprehensive than sandbox ie some interface scenario may not exist in lower environment (non-prod) environment for different reasons but prod may have them.

3. The IT environment outside SAP, would eventually have to be in alignment with Prod SAP database/application ie some ports may be opened at Prod side but closed on sandbox side.

4. Downtime calculations would be more closer to actuals.

Regards, Rishi

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I am writing to express my strong interest in participating in the free SAP certification exam, as I meet the eligibility criteria outlined in your program. My name is Baskar, and I have recently completed the 'Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement' course. I have also attached a screenshot as proof of completion.

I am a first-generation graduate, and transitioning to a career in SAP has been a key aspiration of mine. Though my background is in information technology with 4 years of experience, I am now focused on gaining expertise in SAP. I believe that obtaining SAP certification will equip me with the necessary skills and knowledge to successfully transition into this new career path.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to take part in this program and look forward to your favorable consideration.

Best regards,
Baskar K

entry.title: Re: Excel Multi-Chapter Content Refresh
entry.content: Hi @Eyal_Feiler , it is indeed possible to refresh all interlinked data cache chapters in report at once - at report level in tab Content Refresh. If you're getting error "Missing data source", it probably means that the server datasource haven't been set up properly. When creating link to a datasource, make sure to connect to the server first, then create a connection on said server and use it to refresh data. Here's Help guide chapter on that.

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to use text instead of guid in value help?
entry.content:
Meanwhile I have managed to _PARTLY_ solve this problem.

I have created a value help view for the MakeId field which also references the text field Make:

The help view looks as follows:

..with the result:

It would be nice to get rid of the GUID in the display, any ideas?

entry.title: OAuth Client Credentials Along with User Password Credentials in SAP CPI Receiver
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where we need to post the json payload to HTTP URL using OAuth Client credentials (along with username and password credentials). This works fine with the POSTMAN but I am unable to implement the same in the CPI IFlow. I am working on NEO Tenant.

 

Please suggest.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
With the 2408 release, Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition continues to grow to support new business models and more efficient ways of selling bundled solutions. Major milestones were reached in the previous 2402 release, with the inclusion of the much anticipated Advanced Solution Bundling capability, and the introduction of Sales Kits in solution orders. With 2408, this trajectory is continued with new enhancements which support greater flexibility when operating solution-based business models, enabling a seamless incorporation of solution orders into your business processes, and an improved user experience when creating and selling solution orders.  

Changeable Sales Orders in Solution Orders 


 One of the most significant updates with the 2408 release is the ability to create changeable sales orders from solution orders. If you're selling physical goods as part of a solution order, the process just got an important upgrade. Previously, once a sales order was generated from a solution order, it was in a read-only format, preventing any changes to be made post-release. Now, we have introduced the standard sales order type OR as the default when selling physical goods in a solution. This enables users to modify sales orders after they have been created, allowing for the addition of new products or changes to existing order details. 
 
This enhancement is expected to streamline the order management process and improve flexibility in handling customer orders, allowing sales teams the ability to adapt sales order items from a solution order post-release. Additionally, users can directly navigate to the edit view of the sales order from the solution order to make modifications. Changes to certain characteristics, such as confirmed delivery dates and quantities, are subsequently reflected in the user interface in solution order management. All changes made can be tracked in the change log of the sales item. Moreover, the pricing integration has been improved, offering greater flexibility in managing price copies through pricing types. A new pricing type has also been introduced for re-determining freight costs, discounts, and other costs within the sales order. 

 The benefits of modifiable sales orders extend beyond simple changes. The full range of sales order capabilities, such as advanced Available to Promise functionality, down payment processing, and advanced intercompany processing, is now enabled for goods sold as part of a solution order. Additionally, sales order type OR features which facilitate legal compliance are also now available in solution orders. In essence, all functions of standard sales order type OR processing are now available within solution order management. 

The flexibility brought about by using the standard sales order provides customers with the opportunity to re-define their business roles for solution orders to suit their needs. For example, it allows for the separation of order selling and order fulfillment, whereby a solution order specialist can create the solution order and track it’s progress, whilst a sales colleague can process order fulfilment, making changes to delivery attributes, for example. Watch the below video to see how this enhanced experience is designed to boost user productivity and streamline solution selling and fulfillment for customers. 
 
 

Non-valuated Products In Solution Orders 

In this release, we have grown the footprint of solution order management by introducing a powerful new feature for supporting short-term rental business models, enabling the inclusion of non-valuated products as part of a solution order. This allows businesses to deliver serialized physical products based on non-valuated items, which can be provided to customers without billing. Subsequently, the return of non-valuated products can be managed seamlessly via customer returns. 
 
To leverage this feature, businesses can use free-of-charge sales items without billing, categorized under item type SOR1. It’s essential to assign these products to item category group RP01 in the product master. The system processes these sales items with 100% discounted pricing, making them ideal for use as bundle subitems in solution orders. Upon releasing these items within a solution order, returnable items (item category RP01) are automatically created in follow-up sales orders (type OR only) for delivery, again without billing and with full discount pricing. 

Also supported is tracking of the rented goods in warehouse stock at the individual customer level, and to round off the process, the return of non valuated goods are at the end of the rental agreement is support via customer returns, also including returns with inspection where necessary. 

 
Sales Kits Type CPFH In Solution Orders

With the 2408 release, we extend the capabilities for bill of materials sales in solution orders by including the item category group CPFH as sales items within solution orders. This enhancement allows the system to process these sales BOMs at both the main item and subitem levels, enabling the application of a single, consolidated price to the entire BOM at the main item level.  

Updates to Data Migration Object

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, migration templates are predefined tools used to facilitate the migration of data from legacy systems to the cloud ERP system. These templates are part of the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit, which simplifies the process of transferring data into the cloud. Migration templates help ensure that the data is properly formatted and mapped to the correct fields in the target SAP system. Since the migration template for Solution Orders was introduced in the 2108 release, the functional scope of solution orders has grown considerably. Therefore, with the 2408 release, gaps in the migration template have been addressed and new capabilities added to reflect the current footprint of solution order management. With upgrades made in 2408, the migration template for Solution Orders now supports fields for linking existing projects, PCS pricing calculation for subscription items, and configurable products for sales order and service order and service contract items. 

 

Rateplan Selection for On Subscription Items

Subscription billing is not a native feature of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, however is integrated with solution order management to enable the sale of subscription products as part of a solution order. This means that SAP S/4HANA Cloud integrates with SB for managing subscription-related processes. A significant feature introduced in Subscription Billing which is now supported in SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the ability to define multiple rate plans for a single subscription.  

A rate plan is essentially a set of pricing rules and conditions applied to a subscription. It determines how much a customer is charged and how frequently those charges occur. In Subscription Billing, rate plans include various parameters that govern not only the price but also billing cycles, discounts, and other financial elements. In Subscription Billing, the ability to define multiple rate plans for a single subscription has been introduced, and Solution Order Management has been enhanced to support this update for subscription items sold in a solution order. Previously, businesses had to create separate master data entries for each variation of a rate plan (e.g., different pricing models or billing cycles). This led to a bloated master data setup with multiple entries for what could essentially be one product or service. Now, with multiple rate plans, a single master data entry can support different pricing options, which simplifies the data management process. The user can select the most appropriate rate plan (e.g., monthly, yearly, or usage-based) at the time of creating the solution order, depending on the customer’s preference or contract terms. 
 
Supporting multiple rate plans on subscription items in solution order management has numerous benefits. By reducing the required master data with fewer entries to support different subscription configurations, business can manage data more efficiently. It enables greater flexibility in the solution order offering via different pricing models or billing cycles, and the enhancement streamlines order creation by enabling users to easily select from different rate plans directly in solution order management. Multiple rate plans will benefit customers looking to offer tiered pricing as part of their business models, whilst also supporting geographical variations in pricing and billing to cater to customers in different regions. 


  
Credit Memo and Debit Memo Requests for Invoices with Services and Subscriptions

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408, invoicing for subscription billing and service transactions generated from a solution order have been enhanced with credit memos and debit memos. A credit memo request is a pre-approval document created to reduce the amount owed by a customer on a specific invoice. After approval, the system generates a credit memo, which reflects the agreed-upon reduction and adjusts the customer’s balance accordingly. On the other side, a debit memo request is created when the amount invoiced to the customer was lower than what was owed. It’s a request for additional charges or corrections, often issued when services were underbilled or additional services were provided. Once approved, a debit memo is generated to increase the customer’s balance by the additional amount. 

For solution orders that combine products, services, and subscriptions into a single order, credit and debit memo requests are handled at the solution order level to ensure consistency across products, services, and subscription billing. The system automatically links the credit or debit memo request to the original solution order, ensuring that adjustments are applied correctly. By supporting credit and debit memos, solution order invoicing is made more accurate and customer-friendly with clearer invoicing. 

 

 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

For more information about Sales, please see the Link Collection for Solution Order Management here

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn

 

 

️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Did you miss the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 50-minute-long recording and a presentation for Sales as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

 

Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Job Evaluation in SuccessFactors compensation management
entry.content:
Hi All

Is there any workaround on how to manage the The Hay Method of Job Evaluation in SuccessFactors which deals with the knowledge needed for performing the job, type of problem solving skills and accountabilities for the job and finally calculating the Hay Points for the assigned position and job grade.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano

 

I am Menna Allah Mohamed, an SAP FICO consultant.

 

I am applying for the SAP Digital Skills Initiative because I believe it will open new career opportunities for me and help me reach new heights in my Cloud journey. I am eager to learn from the experts at SAP and gain valuable skills and certifications that will enhance my resume and profile, increasing my chances of securing my dream job. Additionally, this initiative will help me improve my skills in my current position.

 

So, I am very interested in earning a certification from SAP, as I believe it will significantly enhance my skills and career opportunities.

 

Thank you for considering my application.

 

Best regards,

Menna Allah.

entry.title: Send parked invoice status to ARIBA network
entry.content:
Hi,

As per the business scenario, user should be able to reject the invoice parked in S/4 system (on-prem 2020) which was sent from ARIBA network by the supplier in case any error in the invoice data.

Do we have any such provision?

entry.title: Story Reports not working after Importing from PROD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying to export the Story Report from Test to PROD. Some reports are not working correctly. While updating the filters resolves the issue for some reports, others still do not work. Has anyone experienced a similar situation and found a solution?

Thank you,

Dipti

entry.title: 🔵 Embed the latest from SAP HANA’s AI functions into your SAP BTP Application
entry.content:
In this session, Christoph Morgen from the SAP HANA Cloud Product Management team will introduce the recently added Machine Learning and AI functions, designed to enhance your SAP BTP Intelligent Data Application.

The feature list includes data-parallel AutoML (e.g., segmented AutoML TimeSeries), functions for vector data analysis, multi-label classification and regression, and more from the latest SAP HANA Cloud releases, as well as the Predictive Analysis Library (PAL) and the Machine Learning client for SAP HANA.

entry.title: Please let me know which time synchronization solution use in BTP cloud foundry
entry.content:
We have requested from customer what time synchronization solution we use. (example NTP: network time protocol)
I couldn't find what functions were provided in the manual (BTP Cloud foundry).
Customer want answer to their questions before system open and use.
Are there any solutions like NTP in BTP Cloud foundry that we use? we need even simple answer (example: we control time sync in BTP level)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Please let me know which time synchronization solutio...
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP BTP synchronizes its server clocks with a centralized, internal NTP server. All the servers are set to UTC.
Further information can be found documented here:

2628628 - What is the timezone used by SAP BTP and its services?

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: “I now have SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. Do I still need a data warehouse?”
entry.content:
@FreekKeijzer : Free valuable information from FreekKeijzer. Nice blog.

As long as, you dont have any performance issues, you can use Embedded Analytics.

If you want analyse data from different systems/platforms and  to perform some kind of Forecast/Planning  then you can go for Datawarehouse/Datasphere/SAC.

entry.title: In my crosstab bar chart i get 0 values in some columns, how do i get rid of them?
entry.content: It is inside a sub report with  other graphs there

entry.title: Re: Consuming Data from Datasphere to Azure Data Factory via ODBC
entry.content: @vignesh3027 : Could you please explain me  the purpose of consuming the data from Datasphere to Azure data factory.Is there any scenario in your assignment or just knowledge purpose. I have some confusion....Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Bank Statement Reprocessing Rules
entry.content: Hi , Is it possible to maintain parameters for the processing instructions in the app ?

entry.title: Template for processing rules for bank statement with action type "Clear in Sequence"
entry.content: Is it possible to get templates for processing rules for clearings? The templates in my system have all the action type "Post to G/L Account".

entry.title: Re: Template for processing rules for bank statement with...
entry.content:
No, so far the processing rules templates are only created with action type "Post to G/L Account".

For clearings, we offer the SAP Cash Application. Which is an AI service to propose clearings and automate it.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content:
Hi @catlantis 

As per https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-administration-guide/sap-hana-database-license?q=free+tier#free-tier-restrictions:

"For SAP HANA Cloud free tier, only 1 SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database instance per global account per landscape is allowed."

Regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: Any free download for SAP simulation?
entry.content: and for now 2024

entry.title: Re: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories...
entry.content: @ Lothar_Köder : Yes , you are right .. since we are using Script in presenting the dashboard it is using Full mode instead of Light mode and solution seems to be Working and I have issue only using Light mode.

entry.title: Re: Number formatting changes when executing SAC Stories...
entry.content: @MarkSargent : Thank you , any way the work around really worked to cross the Optimized story hurdles and as Lothar mentioned since we are using script it is not using the Light mode.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: #petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

First of all, I would like to express my gratitude for this initiative, as it offers a valuable opportunity for career transformation. I am a Polish woman seeking to change careers mid-life. As a seasoned finance professional fluent in English, Serbian, and Polish, I bring over 10 years of experience in the SSC and BPO sectors. During this time, I have developed expertise in accounting, financial processes, process improvement, and SAP from an end-user perspective.

I am eager to apply these skills as a future SAP S/4HANA FICO consultant, and I strongly believe that obtaining the certification will help me pursue this goal.

Best regards,

Joanna

entry.title: Re: Migrate the ASE database (On-Prem) to the SAP hana Cloud (Public) using SAP advanced SQL migrati
entry.content:
Hi,
 
I think the problem may be in the gateway configuration, this tutorial (step #3) explains very well how to configure the gateway:
 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/advanced-sql-migration-tool-ora-hana.html
 
The tutorial is for source DB Oracle but for ASE is totally similar with the right jdbc driver of course. Please notice this 3 important things:
 
 
- The file with the gateway configuration should be named config.properties. net.acceptor.bindaddress is the ip address or hostname where the gateway is installed and started.  This host should be accessible from the host where you run the migration tool.
  
- For your migration project you should indicate the host and port where the gateway is running, they are defined in parameters #110 and #111 (sapdbmtk config).
 
- The host and port for the ASE server is something you specify in the sapdbmtk extract command line, the tutorial explains how this should be done.
 
 
Try and let me know how it goes, if you don't get it I will be asking for more details to clarify the issue.
 
Thanks.
Javier.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I have recently immigrated to Canada. Beginning career in a new country was really hard financially and mentally as well. As I had to switch my career from Financial Reporting to Finance Transformation. I am really inspired by the number of opportunities it brought forth and want to get some certification to strengthen my knowledge and professional profile.

As I don't have financial means to get a SAP certification nor my current company is supporting in that, I am looking forward to avail this amazing opportunity to get certification.

Regards,
Sohaib Qamar

entry.title: Re: Displaying JSON
entry.content: Thanks. That last piece of code really helped. I was looking for an easy way to display some JSON for testing purposes and your sample eliminated a lot of admin code I would have had to write to get it into a usable format.

entry.title: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point to get the data TYPE you need in ABAP?
entry.content:
I am doing some work to connect to an API using an ABAP HTTP Client. How do I get the data structure to populate and send?

Note: I am working on an ECC system so I might not have access to all solutions proposed.

At this point I have reverse engineered the JSON (building a series of TYPES and putting them together) in a test program until it matches so now I know what the data structure is and how to populate it. 

When I worked with web services in the past we could upload the XSD file for the destination when we want to send data, and that XSD file would generate the ABAP data structures which worked really well.

There must be an easier way to do this. I would appreciated comments from people who have done this and can give advice. I am not a big fan of the "have you tried this?" brigade that are in fact only guessing.

Any experienced advisor would be appreciated.

entry.title: Video Series - Part 12 - Creating custom Business Object with logic
entry.content: This is episode 12 of "Developing side-by-side extensions with CAP for SAP Service Cloud v1" where I am explaining how to test the deployed application through Postman. I will show you how to extend the ticket business object by creating a custom action that will contain the code for retrieving the token and calling the CAP application endpoint that was developed and deployed during the past episodes to Production.

entry.title: How to use RESET in Variant Configuration SCREEN_DEP?
entry.content:
The INVISIBLE function already worked as I follow below thread. But I cannot use the same for RESET function. Is there other prerequisite or steps?

Variant Configuration : Another way to hide charac... - SAP Community

Using Dependencies to Change how Characteristics are Displayed | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: How to post data from SAP PaPM on HANA to SAP ECC on...
entry.content:
Hi Abhijit,

There are two ways to do it. 

1. IDoc integration through PI/PO layer

2. If PaPM on-premise: you can use External RFA methode to post data in ECC.

Depending on the data size, performance may vary. IDoc might take longer time for large number of records. 

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Filter does not work
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

The filter works as long as you set the filter value to the exact value that is shown in the Changes section of properties.  So, open the Changes section of properties and set your filter value to this value:

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: indeed,

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: indeed, Vitaliy.

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: ok trying again.. indeed Vitaliy. This occured on my first attempt. I have no reference to it on the instance manager. I have deleted the sub account. I have created a new on on AWS AND on Azure East.. Both of these resulted in me being able to create a hana instance. Creating again a new sub account (mind you with the other instances deleted) I still get the same message that you can have only one instance. I am not sure what us going on here. So.. it looks like there is a stuck ghost instance for me on azure (west). Again I repeat, there is NO listed instances, the first time I ran I got a lost connection.. then the message you cannot have more than one (yes, we all know that).. .deleting all instances of hana tools and then sub account makes no difference.. I cannot get a hana instance running on azure west. Thoughts?

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point to get the data TYPE you need in ABAP?
entry.content: Not aware of any tools that would take a JSON payload and propose an ABAP data structure. A simple construction of types and proper use of serialize/deserialize should be sufficient - I have used it before in a special exeption case where I could not use CPI.

entry.title: Re: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap cpi payload
entry.content: Very simple with XSLT...

entry.title: XX-PART-DVD
Re: Enable Now Re-designed Panel Design
entry.content:
Hi David,

The new design is now available in Production so if you add CMP4=1 to an existing SAP Companion configuration, you should see the new design. 

If you are using SAP Companion in an application where the SAP Companion configuration is created in Manager, e.g. Ariba, Concur or SAC, you will have to update the SAP Companion configuration in Manager.  Turn on the following setting to see the new design:

Unfortunately, I don't think that it's current possible to modify the image in the bottom, right corner of the new panel.  Certainly there is nothing in the documentation to indicate that it is possible at this time.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Change "Type" Requirement to Project Task
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have created some Requirements and wanted to change it to a Project Task. I have tried to export from excel "for update" change the type to "Project Task" and reimport, but the the type is not changing and stay as "Requirement". Anyway to change via Mass or via excel or any other way, to not create them again one by one as a task?

Hope someone can help me...

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use distribution (FAGLGA35) to distribute from...

Hi Bob,

The point is I have no idea whether the account can be allocated to another account in 'Distribution' Functionality and how to do that. Although I make the 'GL account ' show and can be input in 'FAGLGA32' as receiver, the distribution cycle executed failed then. It said 'no receiver'. 

Thanks & regards,

Tracy

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to use text instead of guid in value help?
entry.content:
@ui.textArrangement: #TEXT_ONLY
MakeId

in your root view

entry.title: Re: Consolidation unit can't be deleted because of invali...
entry.content: Hello, is this "Consolidation Unit" in one of the fields in Fiori App: Define Selections? if so ,remove the consolidation unit

entry.title: #COE#BUMA MMPUR_PR_PROFNL_ITM_CTF not available in extension points upon creating custom logic
entry.content:
Hi,

Upon creating custom logic with extension point MMPUR_PR_PROFNL_ITM_CTF in S/4HC Public Cloud, there is no data available and no result showing. In 2308 upgrade it is one of the newly introduced custom logic extensibility for PR. Any idea why it is not available now?

Thanks,

Jen

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I am writing to express my strong interest in participating in the free SAP certification exam, as I meet the eligibility criteria outlined in your program. My name is Baskar, and I have recently completed the "Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" course. I have attached a screenshot as proof of completion.

As a first-generation graduate, transitioning to a career in SAP has been a key aspiration of mine. With a background in information technology and four years of experience, I am now focused on gaining expertise in SAP. I believe that obtaining SAP certification will equip me with the necessary skills and knowledge to successfully navigate this new career path.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to take part in this program and look forward to your favorable consideration.

Best regards,
Baskar K.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content:
Hi Junwu,

I tried to change my request body and still error (404)
with this url
/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet?$format=json
and

Error (405) with this url
/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet('0050000004')?$format=json

Both the request body is
{
    "DocType" : "TA",
    "SalesOrg" : "8900",
    "DistrChan" : "10",
    "Division" : "11",
    "TextLine" : "coba text",
    "ItmNumber" : "000010",
    "ReqQty" : "15.000",
    "PartnRole" : "AG",
    "PartnNumb" : "0001000000",
    "Material" : "000000000030000032",
    "Plant" : "8921",
    "TargetQty" : "15.000",
    "CondType" : "",
    "CondValue" : "0.000000000"
}

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: Junwu, thanks, but I tried it and still error... I have posted the screnshot on other answer because I can not attach picture in this comment section

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: remove $format=json

entry.title: Table for Charge Type of TM
entry.content:
Greeting,

Experts, I'd like to know which table I can find the Charge Type ID & Description?

Best Regards

Roger

entry.title: Re: Custom Logic for S4HANA intercompany notification
entry.content: Hi Arturo, Thanks for your information. By the way is there any custom logic sample when goods issue document is created and automatically send email.

entry.title: Re: Asset Aquisition posting to WBS in S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

"asset acquisition value should be part of my WBS cost reports" may need clarification.

because asset acquisition post to fixed asset BS account, not P&L accounts, 

you can enter WBS in Fixed asset master data, then depreciation expenses will post to that WBS element.

Possibly, a custom development report can show a Balance sheet  for WBS/Project considering asset acquisition value.

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: How to use distribution (FAGLGA35) to distribute from...
entry.content:
Hi Tracy,

Please refer to step by step tutorial for distribution below, the function is same for OP and Cloud.

https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/pub/s4/index.html?library=library.txt&show=book!BO_820C0C1396FF69B4#book!BO_D752AD91495550BF

Br, Bob

entry.title: SAP EAM - Epic, Feature Example
entry.content: Can someone please give me an example of epic, feature, and user story from SAP context?  Like for example, if I have EAM, I am assuming "Preventative Maintenance", "Corrective Maintenace", "Management of Change" is considered as epic....  Please advise...  If there are other tracks, I can relate to, then please give me an example of that...

entry.title: Re: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content: Thank You Uma.

entry.title: Re: Consolidation process
entry.content:
Hello,

ownership percentages post to statistical FS items.

there are two methods for investment consolidation.

1.Rule based

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/5ce06895106a463ca073fddae0f7a473.html?locale=en-US

2.Activity based

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/2f07a213a53f425eada2e096f6c6f1b0.html?locale=en-US

as for consolidation attributes, they can be maintained in Fiori App: Define Consolidation Units

and be used in Fiori app: Define Selection

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: Goods Issue Reversal, Cancel Picking and Outbound Delivery Zero Out Quantity
entry.content:
Hello @PrasannaG ,

Nice blog to understand easily. Just a suggestion you can add monitor screen to show the stock difference happening during this process also how it appears in S4 or ECC side.

Regards

Darshan Desai

entry.title: Sales Document Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I created the sales document workflow configuration steps and it says on the creation of sales order "In Approval" status. But couldn't see any orders in My Inbox app for SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Please throw some lights on what could be wrong.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori

Dear

you can have a look at CDS view :I_OperationalAcctgDocItem 

and use below apps for additional steps for data extraction

Sen

entry.title: Re: Deploying a fiori application from BAS for SAP S/4 HA...
entry.content: your package should be z*, the abap repository object name should be z****

entry.title: GP Query Report for the current month to be sent to email
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on creating a GP Query Report based on A/R Invoices for the current month, which will be sent via email. I plan to use the Alerts Management feature to handle the email sending. We are currently using SAP B1 HANA 10.0.

I found a query from this community and made some modifications to fit our needs. However, I would appreciate any advice or guidance to ensure it runs smoothly because I got an error.

SELECT T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], sum(T1.[LineTotal]) FROM OINV T0 INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(MM,T0.DocDate,CURRENT_DATE=0) GROUP BY T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName]

UNION ALL

SELECT T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], -sum(T1.[LineTotal]) FROM ORIN T0 INNER JOIN RIN1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(MM,T0.DocDate,CURRENT_DATE=0) GROUP BY T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName]

entry.title: Re: Open purchase order list
entry.content: great point

entry.title: Re: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap c...
entry.content:
Hi Nidhi, 

Below XSLT will achieve the result you want

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
    <xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" indent="yes"/>
    
    <!-- Identity transform using xsl:mode -->
    <xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>
    
    <!-- Special handling for AdditionalComments -->
    <xsl:template match="AdditionalComments">
        <xsl:copy>
            <xsl:value-of select="div"/>
        </xsl:copy>
    </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content: When I run with input it is working fine but when I run without input giving errors because of huge data. So, I want to put validation on GO button

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content: I think pagination is there by default. how come you say it is loading 12lakh data?

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content:
Run with selection field Input - working fine

Run without selection field Input - throwing exceptions

So, to restrict this need GO button validation - Please suggest me any solution for GO button validation

Akshay reddy

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report

entry.title: debug doesn't work
entry.content:
hi

 i am working in sap by design solution 

i finish devekope my sulution 

i moove it to the prod tenant 

now i have to do some changes in the solution 

so i created patch then i get a new solution in the test tenant in a ststus "in development "

 

now i want to debus this solution 

i set breakpoints 

and start debug mode 

i dont see any problem or alert 

but actually the code running not stop in the breakpoint that i set 

what can be the problem ?

i can add one more detailes 

the last action that i did in the first basic solution 

was to create a .bac file

 Could it be related to this?

what can i do now 

i must have the option to debug this solution

entry.title: Preceding Whitespace is trimmed when an IDoc is sent from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We are sending an IDOC from SAP Integration suite to SAP ECC systems, but noticed preceding whitespace is being trimmed in a field when it reaches SAP ECC. The logic in mapping is such that if we have more than 70 characters in file name , then a new segment gets created with remaining characters of filename. And when the 71st character is a whitespace this is being trimmed at SAP ECC.

When we switch on trace or simulate it in Integration Suite the space is visible , but is missing when we check the same in SAP ECC systems.

We tried the same example via SAP PO and noticed the space appearing in SAP ECC.

Filename Example - Batch HF_ID225test_2024xxxxxxxxxx_xxxxx_x_xxx 2024 036_xxx_an_xxxxxxxx Seeds_20240912.pdf

Could someone suggest if this is standard behavior of SAP Integration Suite or if there is any standard solution to achieve expected outcome in SPA ECC  

SAP IS simulation

SAP ECC

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point t...
entry.content: Hi, we need to get API documentation from the API provider. I don't see any other way. Tools like swagger can be used to check the documentation if at all API provider enabled them.

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: SAP Procure to Pay Process(P2P)Different Scenarios-Part-1

Thanks

 

When migrating legacy PO to S4Hana in the P2P cycle, what are the certain steps that need to be followed?

entry.title: CDS Hierarchy for query browser not allowed
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I am trying to have the tree layout in Query Browser' app where the hierarchy logic should be based on Work Breakdown Structures (WBS).

The issue that I am having is: in CDS, when I am setting @AnalyticsDetails.query.displayHierarchy:ON the I got following error: 'Annotations of & use hierarchies, but & does not have any [Analytics]'

For the same set up on another key column, this hierarchy set up works.

Is there a specific annotation that I have missed or we have some special rules about only specific key column are allowed to have 'displayHierarchy' set as 'ON'

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content:
Hello @thomas_jung 

Thank you for replaying. I added ID in the wrong place because of this sentence "Then just add this integer to the end of the following URL: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/scnId.Her...." I add id to the end of the link like "/scnId.Her1440128" .

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello,

don't know if the CLI is working for Database Users, but that's the only possible way to create mass users by file. I would at least try it before creating 350 by hand 😉 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/72dc33a8f41944f78318138bc1a57307.html?locale=en-US

Maybe you also create one by hand for a Space and then try read all the users from the Space, and hopefully you have a blueprint what params you have to Input for your Database User.

But the longer I read the docu for managing Users with CLI the more I think this is only meant for "real" Users and not DB-Users, but you can try it !

Regards
Julian

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
How to find average based on entries of transactional data?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. I want to write a data action logic which calculates the average sales based on no of products present in the transactional data. For example, product quantity is present for three products in the transactional data. To calculate average sales, the formula is Total sales / (no. of products present in transactional data). Please refer below screenshot.

I'm unable to find unique records for products in the data action logic. Currently, there are three products and this product count is not fixed, it can four or five anytime. A data action action logic which can dynamically work in all scenarios irrespective of product quantity changing over period of time. 

Anyone who has faced such type of issue or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial API management configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting the following error when tried configuring API management capability of Integration suite. Any advice on how to configure this?

entry.title: Settlement management based on threshold value
entry.content:
Hi,

In settlement management when final settlement happens Business user wanted the settlement document to be created only when the threshold limit is met that is only when the sales volume has reached say 10000 USD, then only the accrual amount can be settled, if the sales volume hasn't reached then settlement should not happen.how this can be achieved?

entry.title: The OnPremise proxy type only supports http schema for 'URL' and 'tokenServiceURL' properties.
entry.content: sap btp destination for on-premise system. The OnPremise proxy type only supports http schema for 'URL' and 'tokenServiceURL' properties.

entry.title: Re: Asset Aquisition posting to WBS in S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Inventory is also BS account, however it gets reflected in WBS reports; During PCE/On Prem days, we used to post a statistical entry Value Type 11 to the WBS.

entry.title: Re: What is the default value for "Format Options" genera...
entry.content:
It was the localization tutorial. 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-mobile-dev-kit-i18n-localization.html#3f92ec9d-92c1-461e-bb36-c6d0da442c32
The issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: Excel Multi-Chapter Content Refresh

entry.title: Re: Extension Project in Business Application Studio ?
entry.content: Hi Arushi, the wizard to create an adaptation project will automatically create an extension project in case it detects that the original app does not support an adaptation project.

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point t...
entry.content: Thanks @rajnag that is what I did. I just assumed there would be an easier way as this is a silly admin load to put onto the developer. Doesn't feel like it respects the developer's time.
